3.anchor: “Because of you I will rebuke your descendants

10.anchor: Do we not all have one Father

12.anchor: remove him from the tents of Jacob

15.anchor: Has not the one God made you? You belong to him in body and spirit. And what does the one God seek? Godly offspring.
15.note: The meaning of the Hebrew for the first part of this verse is uncertain.

16.anchor: , the God of Israel, “does violence to the one he should protect,”
16.note: Or “I hate divorce,” says the Lord
